seo.title: Alex Developer — Portfolio
seo.description: The portfolio of Alex Developer, a full stack engineer.

about: I build things for the web. I'm a software engineer specializing in building (and occasionally designing) exceptional digital experiences. Currently, I'm focused on building accessible, human-centered products.

experience.description: Architected the core web application, improving performance by 40%. Led a team of 5 developers to deliver the new dashboard interface.
Developed features for the flagship mobile app using React Native. Integrated third-party APIs and optimized data fetching.

projects.title: One-Click Portfolio
projects.description: A viral GitHub repository where developers just fork, edit one JSON file, and get a live deployed portfolio.

projects.title: AI Image Generator
projects.description: An open-source tool that acts as a wrapper around Stable Diffusion API to generate high-quality images from text descriptions.

projects.title: Terminal Theme Manager
projects.description: CLI tool to switch between terminal color schemes seamlessly.
